DEBUG-CHAIN-FORWARD.summary: Debug-only Phase B test. On the leader: lazy-register a source pool against peers[0].client's PD, fill it with the test pattern (byte[i] = i % 256), RDMA-WRITE <length> bytes to peers[0] (F1) and send CHAIN-FORWARDED. F1 cascades down the chain on its worker thread. Caller then runs CHAIN-PING against each follower to verify byte equality. Removed once Phase B is wired into the real mergeBackpatchTick path.
DEBUG-CHAIN-FORWARD.complexity: O(length) RDMA WRITE plus one chain TCP RPC.
